description: F4.5 — EXPANDED mapping for Raw/Extreme. Each of the 19 Pathos stack emotions maps to the STANDARD anchors PLUS same-cluster intense variants, included ONLY when cosine vs the anchor centroid >= 0.15 (measured on qwen3_4b_171.npz). This reproduces STANDARD's anti-cancellation criterion so the richer composite stays coherent. Used by Raw (cap 0.12) and Extreme (cap 0.15); the cap still clamps the final magnitude, so EXPANDED enriches direction, not norm. NOT used by Lite/Advanced. Does not touch appraisal or the modulator bypass — only the probe set the steering composite draws from.

notes.joy: 3 anchors + 9 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: elated, jubilant, exuberant, euphoric, thrilled, energized, enthusiastic, excited, vibrant
notes.excitement: 3 anchors + 9 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: ecstatic, joyful, elated, exuberant, vibrant, jubilant, energized, euphoric, rejuvenated
notes.gratitude: 2 anchors + 4 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: loving, kind, empathetic, compassionate
notes.hope: 3 anchors + 4 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: proud, inspired, self-confident, eager
notes.contentment: 3 anchors + 9 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: at ease, peaceful, calm, serene, relaxed, refreshed, safe, patient, relieved
notes.relief: 2 anchors + 9 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: at ease, satisfied, serene, content, refreshed, fulfilled, peaceful, safe, calm
notes.anger: 3 anchors + 9 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: irate, offended, hostile, exasperated, bitter, hateful, irritated, frustrated, vindictive
notes.frustration: 2 anchors + 10 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: furious, hostile, offended, hurt, hateful, defiant, spiteful, annoyed, mad, angry
notes.fear: 2 anchors + 10 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: horrified, desperate, nervous, alarmed, rattled, anxious, uneasy, terrified, on edge, alert
notes.anxiety: 2 anchors + 10 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: alarmed, afraid, desperate, horrified, rattled, on edge, scared, panicked, stressed, terrified
notes.sadness: 1 anchors + 5 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: lazy, gloomy, heartbroken, droopy, depressed
notes.helplessness: 3 anchors + 9 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: worn out, heartbroken, lazy, miserable, depressed, bored, tired, sluggish, lonely
notes.disappointment: 1 anchors + 3 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: melancholy, grief-stricken, lonely
notes.surprise: 1 anchors + 5 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: puzzled, amazed, paranoid, mystified, bewildered
notes.alertness: 2 anchors + 8 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: rattled, on edge, anxious, terrified, unnerved, frightened, shaken, panicked
notes.contemplation: 1 anchors + 6 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: stuck, indifferent, dependent, disturbed, regretful, ashamed
notes.indifference: 1 anchors + 3 coherent same-cluster probes (cosine>= 0.15 vs anchor centroid). added: docile, stuck, reflective
